characters.appearance: Various individuals appearing rapidly in sequence. Includes a mariachi, a woman, a skeleton, a masked person, and dancers.
characters.wardrobe: Diverse attire including mariachi suits, casual street clothes, leather jackets, and traditional Mexican dresses.
characters.demeanor: Ranges from stoic and mysterious to dynamic and expressive.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: बाकियों की तरह पीछे नहीं रहना था मुझे, इसलिए खुद पर invest किया। [I didn't want to stay behind like the rest, so I invested in myself.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable desire for self-improvement and career growth.
- Establishes a confident, aspirational tone.
- Sets up the "glow-up" premise of the ad.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी English नहीं बोल पाओगे" ["You'll never be able to speak English"]
Me 2.5 months after switching to Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: शुरुआत में गलतियां भी हुईं, बोलने में झिझक भी हुई, [I made mistakes in the beginning, hesitated to speak too,]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Acknowledges the common struggles and fears of learning spoken English.
- Builds empathy and trust with the audience.
- Maintains the rhythmic, spoken-word pacing of the original.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी English नहीं बोल पाओगे" ["You'll never be able to speak English"]
Me 2.5 months after switching to Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: पर Supernova के AI tutor के साथ रोज़ practice की, और अब मेरा confidence बोलता है। [But I practiced daily with Supernova's AI tutor, and now my confidence speaks.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff and introduces the solution (Supernova).
- Highlights the core feature of daily AI practice.
- Ends on a strong, empowering note proving the "haters" wrong.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी English नहीं बोल पाओगे" ["You'll never be able to speak English"]
Me 2.5 months after switching to Supernova
